programme.desc: Mad Rabbid and his assistant get stuck in prehistoric times when the teleporta-TV runs out of juice.

programme.title: Rabbid Hibernation and the time machine.
programme.desc: After it breaks down in the middle of the desert, Hibernation Rabbid's Machine is stolen by the rabbids.

programme.title: The Rabbids are panicking!
programme.desc: After a misunderstanding, two Rabbids become convinced that their boss has turned into a balloon.

programme.title: Rabbids VS Technology.
programme.desc: The Rabbids get locked inside a supermarket for the night.

programme.title: The Rabbids are making a mess!
programme.desc: After discovering the joys of tennis, the Rabbids move the game onto an airport runway.

programme.title: Pumpkin Reports
programme.desc: Max Green's new brother and sister are aliens sent to Earth as the advance party for an invasion - and he's the only one who can stop them turning humans into unwilling slave-gardeners.

programme.title: I'll Get You! Holiday
programme.desc: The action takes place in all year round resort, where Wolf doesn't chase Hare to eat him anymore: now it's all about sports and competition. However, in his crazy chase after recognition and victories the grey hooligan often uses methods that aren't really fair, which provokes awkward and funny situations.

programme.title: Pirate school
programme.desc: On a small remote island surrounded by endless seas, a special Pirate School was opened, where children from pirate families study. Among them are Keel, Fuse and Bobo. The pirate origin does not relieve them from study and normal school duties.

programme.title: Sunny Bunnies
programme.desc: The Sunny Bunnies are five fluffy balls of light named Turbo, Big Boo, Shiny, Iris and Hopper who can appear anywhere there is light. The Bunnies always bring joy and happiness, beaming down to explore new and exciting locations, finding fun and mischievous games to enjoy.

programme.title: VIP Pets
programme.desc: We are the VIP Pets! The coolest pets with a passion for hair! We are best friends and together we will discover lots of beautiful hairstyles and go on exciting adventures!

programme.title: The Secrets of Honey Hills
programme.desc: Honey Hills is a small seaside town where all kind of animals live. It's a good neighbourhood. However, mysterious and inexplicable events sometimes cause misunderstandings among neighbours. Then, genius detective Sophie the Owl together with her young assistant Chirp the Squirrel take up the investigation.

programme.title: The Adventures of Peter and Wolf
programme.desc: A sitcom about the adventures of ordinary schoolboy Peter and talking Wolf connecting the world of people to parallel universes, where there live robots and vampires, werewolves and zombies, giants and aliens, fairies and centaurs, clones and invisible men! The characters will have to solve locals' problems and regularly save the world.

programme.title: The Fixies
programme.desc: The Fixies follows the comical misadventures of Tom Thomas and his secret friendship with Simka and Nolik, the children of the Fixie family that lives in his apartment. There's just no end to the troubles Tom Thomas and his Fixie friends get themselves into with all the gadgets and appliances around them!

programme.title: Eliot Kid
programme.desc: When a tooth falling out turns into a hunt for the “giant mouse”, when the city's sewers transform into Indiana Jones' white rapids or when a trip to the toilets becomes an expedition to a haunted house, well then you've entered the wonderful world of Eliot Kid!

programme.title: Angry Birds Toons
programme.desc: Check out Angry Birds Toons compilations! Each compilation has several episodes from your favorite shows including Angry Birds, Piggy Tales, and Stella!

programme.title: Chefclub Kids
programme.desc: With Chefclub Kids, the little ones get their hands dirty all while having fun in the kitchen. Whether they're learning to prepare dinner, bake goodies, or explore new flavors, Chefclub Kids is a way for children to gain confidence through cooking!

programme.title: GWR Incredible Record Breakers
programme.desc: Guinness World Records presents Incredible Record Breakers from all over.

programme.title: Beyblade G Revolution E15
programme.desc: In Madrid for the Spanish leg of the World Championships, the hard-of-sleeping Lee has a nightmare that Ray kicks him off the team for his poor play. The day before their next match, White Tiger X encounters a pair of beyblading jugglers in Madrid's main square, who also happen to be trick bladers.

programme.title: Beyblade G Revolution E16
programme.desc: As Max prepares to face Kai in the next round, the members of BBA Revolution overhear a confrontation between Johnny and Robert of the Majestics and Barthez Battalion.

programme.title: Beyblade G Revolution E17
programme.desc: The BBA Revolution are slated to face the sneaky Barthez Battalion, but while Hilary and Kenny want to report their dirty deeds to the authorities, Tyson believes the best way to teach them a lesson is to beat them fair and square...But that's before he really sees how low the team will sink to win.

programme.title: Beyblade G Revolution E18
programme.desc: Our heroes land in Egypt for the next leg of the tournament where the first two teams going up against each other are the Blitzkrieg Boys against the Barthez Battalion. But as Barthez readies his team, we learn he's devised a special spider web-like tape that is supposed to shoot out of his team's blades and trap their opponents in an inescapable web.

programme.title: Beyblade G Revolution E19
programme.desc: Max is having trouble convincing Rick that he is truly dedicated to the PPB All Starz. Max just wants to play for love of the game but Rick thinks he should do anything to win. When the competition continues Max demands they fight a "pairs" match so that he and Rick are forced to work as a team.

programme.title: Beyblade G Revolution E1
programme.desc: Tyson has just returned back from the World Championships with another victory and he's decided to teach a class of boys in the neighborhood the fine art of blading.

programme.title: Beyblade G Revolution E2
programme.desc: Tyson has his hands full when he's confronted by a tough little Blader named Daichi. Just as they're about to battle another mysterious Blader named Jin shows up and wants to challenge Tyson as well. All three Bladers mix it up but Ray puts a stop to the fight when he realizes that Tyson can't handle two Bladers at once.

programme.title: Beyblade G Revolution E3
programme.desc: Daichi continues to annoy Tyson with his constant battle challenges, which Tyson refuses to give in to - even after an embarrassing confrontation at the public swimming pool proves that Daichi is an impressive and highly skilled Beyblader.

programme.title: Beyblade G Revolution E4
programme.desc: Tyson's alone and picking up the pieces of what used to be The Bladebreakers... Daichi won't leave him alone, and Kai is...well, Kai...at least he's got the championships to look forward too, right? Meanwhile, both Ray and Max are going through the growing pains of being part of a new team.

programme.title: Beyblade G Revolution E5
programme.desc: At the preliminaries for the World Championships, Daichi wins his matches easily, establishing himself as a new powerhouse on the Beyblading scene. Kenny also competes, defeating his opponents with such skill that even Tyson is impressed.

programme.title: Beyblade G Revolution E6
programme.desc: There's only one round left in the tournament to decide who's going to partner up with Tyson in the World Beyblade Tag Team Championships and it's between Daichi and Kai.

programme.title: Beyblade G Revolution E7
programme.desc: The Block A and Block B finals of the Beyblade World Championships are underway. Max wins his match and finds himself partnered with a real bully of a blader named Rick.

programme.title: Beyblade G Revolution E8
programme.desc: The BBA Revolution Team heads to a remote training camp to prepare for the upcoming tournament. When they first arrive, Hiro tells Tyson that Kai has quit the team.

programme.title: Beyblade G Revolution E9
programme.desc: The BBA Revolution team fly to New York City for the Beyblade World Championships. The normally feisty Daichi proves to be afraid of flying, and once in the city, he becomes overwhelmed by the size and scope of things in the Big Apple.

programme.title: Beyblade G Revolution E10
programme.desc: The teams have been selected and the finals are about to begin...Unfortunately Tyson finds himself facing all of his former friends...each part of a team that he will eventually have to 'blade against.

programme.title: Beyblade G Revolution E11
programme.desc: Tyson blames his embarrassing loss to Ray on Daichi, telling the team he's better off competing alone. As Tyson runs away, the US Finals continue with Rick of the PPB All Starz against Claude of Barthez Battalion.

programme.title: Rekkit Rabbit: Rekkit Rabbit
programme.desc: Jay's favourite volleyball player is playing at the local stadium, and Jay really wants to go but he isn't allowed out at night In order to make the daytime last longer, Rekkit steals the moon from the sky.

programme.title: Rekkit Rabbit: Rekkit Rabbit
programme.desc: To keep Lorne happy, Jay agrees to take part in the Little Mister Potato Guy contest, even though he is mortified and embarrassed.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: After Dennis breaks his bike, Dad is unable to afford a new one, so Dennis convinces him to ask his boss for a raise. Unfortunately, Mr Scrimp reduces his wages instead. Dennis then trashes his house to convince Scrimp that his family are poor, so that Mr Scrimp will feel compelled to raise Dad's wages. Just as Scrimp has been taken in by Dennis' plan, Mum and Dad arrive home laden with shopping bags, resulting in Dad getting fired on the spot. Dennis resolves to get Dad his old job back by secretly causing chaos at his office. To restore order Scrimp rehires Dad, sealing the deal with a generous pay rise. Mum and Dad repair the house, but still don't have enough money to buy Dennis a new bike, instead it gets repaired with Dad's office rubber bands and paperclips. Followed by 60 Second Dennis and 'Dennis Hiccups'.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Believing Gnasher and Gnipper to be trapped in Beanotown Dog Pound, Dennis comes up with a plan to rescue his friends and bring them both home. Followed by more Dennis and Gnasher episodes.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: When Dennis breaks his skateboard again, Dad agrees to buy Dennis the best skateboard there is as a replacement if he is able to win a prize at the upcoming school award ceremony. Followed by 60 Second Dennis and 'Dance of the Seven Pies'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis tries to get a birthday present by saying thank you to his relatives. However, because of Dennis' naughty personality, they take his attempts in a negative way. Followed by 'Dennis Hiccups'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: To get his friends back from Walter's group, Dennis challenges Walter to a videogames battle. Followed by 60 Second Dennis and 'Masters of the House'.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: After a wrestling accident, Gnasher swallows a canister of laughing gas at the vet's. Dennis, along with Gnasher hide in the conference centre, where dad gives a speech. However, the canister leaks, causing Gnasher to fart laughing gas and having everyone laughing. Followed by 'Attack of the Walterbot'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis and Co. have to control Pie Face's obsession with pies during the Pie Festival. Otherwise, they will be grounded. Followed by 'Great Outdoors'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: On a school trip, Dennis finds out that he is descentant to a warrior tribe. He also discovers that Montanna Smith (a famous Indiana Jones-esque explorer and one of Walter's personal heroes) is actually a thief who's trying to steal the treasure of Dennis' ancestor. Will he be stopped before he gets his hands on the treasure? Followed by Dog Tired.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Mum has bought curtain material for the soon to be newly decorated kitchen, and asks Dad to look after it while she is out. However, Dad falls asleep and mistakenly agrees that Dennis can use it as a giant sail. When Dad realises that it has gone, he calls Dennis to bring it back, but unfortunately Dennis gets into a spot of bother with the colonel, who takes the curtain material off Dennis. In an attempt to steal it back, the garden being wrecked and the kitchen is left looking like a bombsite. Dennis, Gnasher and Dad have to clean up the whole kitchen and redecorate it in time for Mum returning. When Mum decides it is time to hang the new curtains, Dennis is about to get the curtain material, but Mum reveals that she has changed her mind and bought new curtains instead. Followed by 'Fangs for the Memories'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis, his friends and Walter's friends get marooned on a desert island when Dennis attempts to escape a boring field trip. Followed by Substitute Creecher

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis plays a prank on the citizens of Beanotown, causing them to evacuate, which causes trouble for Dennis later. Followed by 'No Place Like Home'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Gnasher and Gnipper enter a dog show, regardless of Walter saying they don't have true talent. He wants Athena and Miss Mini Wuff to win, but Walter has just underestimated Gnasher's true capabilities. Followed by Grounded.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Athena gets Gnasher envy when seeing a pampered version of Gnasher in a magazine and when she hears that Dennis owns an Abyssinian wire-haired tripe hound (Gnasher), she wants him. However, being an owner to Gnasher isn't all cracked up to be! Followed by 'Splash'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis gets a case of the hiccups from Mr. Har Har's can-o-giggles and is looking for a way to cure them ready for a film premier. Followed by Athena's Party

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: The garden is accidentaly wrecked when Dennis tries to give Gnasher a bath, so the gang have to fix the mess before Mum comes home. Followed by 'Run Rabbit Run'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis makes a line of practical jokes for Mr. Scrimp, called 'The Menace Collection.' However, Dennis soon learns that it will put Mr. Har Har out of business.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: After Walter takes up origami as a martial art, Dennis scoffs and comes up with his own martial art, and so the two prepare to battle it out. Followed by 'Smelling of Roses'

programme.title: Polly Pocket
programme.desc: When Polly inherits a magic locket that allows her to shrink to four inches tall, she embraces her pocket-sized powers and finds the upside of shrinking is big fun!

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu is a cheeky, charming penguin who finds himself in comical situations in his snowy world!

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu is a cheeky, charming penguin who finds himself in comical situations in his snowy world!

programme.title: Operation Ouch
programme.desc: The Doctors demonstrate how our body movements are controlled by confusing their very own brains! Dr Chris lets a blood-sucking leech feed on his arm and Dr Xand goes on call with an emergency ambulance team. Meanwhile over in accident and emergency, a patient has locked their jaw wide open and another needs stitches after a particularly nasty fall...

programme.title: Dennis & Gnasher
programme.desc: Cat-astrophic comedy capers with the wise-cracking, nap-taking and lasagne-loving cat Garfield.

programme.title: Science Max
programme.desc: Have you ever done a science experiment and wondered “What would this be like if it were HUGE?” - Welcome to Science Max, the exciting series that turbocharges science experiments.

programme.title: Grojband
programme.desc: Grojband follows the story of a band of the same name formed by Corey Riffin as they work together to propel their band to international stardom.

programme.title: Rabbids Invasion
programme.desc: We don't know where they came from. We don't know how they got here. But we do know this: they're here to play!

programme.title: The Hoobs: Hello
programme.desc: Groove thinks there can't be a better way of saying hello than giving his tail a good old wagga-wagga - but how do the Tiddlypeeps say hello?

programme.title: Pinkalicious & Peterrific: Sidewalk Art
programme.desc: While drawing with Chalk, Pinkalicious begins to tell her friends an epic story about Puddles the poodle and Splish-Splash the cat.

programme.title: Road Rangers: Ambulance Donna is Here / Frank-In-Style
programme.desc: Road Rangers are a group of super heroes comprising of five street vehicles a police car, fire truck, ambulance, tow truck and garbage truck that fight crime and strive hard to keep their city safe! Call Donna, the cutest cartoon ambulance, if you've hurt yourself and she will be there in a jiffy to save the day. Sing and dance along to this car cartoon song just about Donna! / Frank is back with this funny silly antics in trying to become something that he is not! Watch as he learns all about self-confidence and learning to love oneself as you are in this fun filled kids episode with his friends tractor, ambulance, car, bike, fire engine, monster truck, garbage truck, loader, excavator, dumper, digger, tow truck, crane, helicopter and more.

programme.title: 64 Zoo Lane: The Story of Esmeralda the Snake
programme.desc: A neat & tidy snake regrets her kind offer of a shared burrow when Herbert the Warthog moves in. Disaster strikes and they are both made homeless. Only then do they appreciate what they had together.

programme.title: HeyKids: Three Little Pigs / The Ugly Duckling
programme.desc: The Three Little Pigs cartoon is based on an European fairy tale about three little pigs who built three houses and lived happily... until a Big Bad Wolf appeared.

programme.title: Little Angel: Morning Routine Before School / I Like School / Lemonade Stand
programme.desc: Baby John has to decide what to put on first in his busy morning routine. / Baby John is ready for his first day of school. / Baby John, Jack, and Jill have fun making lemonade for their lemonade stand.

programme.title: Dino Ranch Shorts: Dino Ranchers Fly & more!
programme.desc: Nursery rhyme 'Dino Ranchers Fly', 'Dinosaur Dinosaur', Light Touch Tango', & 'Tangos Dancing Song' music videos from the hit TV show, Dino Ranch.

programme.title: Doggyland: Twinkle Twinkle Little Star / ABC Song / Bully Song / ROY G BIV / Welcome to Doggyland
programme.sub-title: Kids Songs & Nursery Rhymes by Snoop Dogg / Affirmations Part 2
programme.desc: Enjoy this R&B inspired rendition of Twinkle Twinkle Little Star presented by Snoop Dogg! This video stars two puppies as they venture into the night sky, guided by a kind star that helps them fall as

programme.title: Everything's Rosie
programme.desc: WILL dreams of flying like a bird.

programme.title: Ria Rabbit: A Is For Ant / B Is For Ball / C Is For Cup / D Is For Doll / E Is For Engine / F Is For Fox / G Is For Grasshopper / H Is For Hat / I Is For Island
programme.desc: A cute and engaging video where each letter is taught with its alphabet letter sound.

programme.title: The Adventures of Bob Zoom: The Storm / The Zip Line
programme.desc: In the middle of another adventure, the gang has to hide, because it started raining. What seemed to be a tedious day, in fact, becomes a very beautiful one when they realize that observing nature can be quite fun. / The adventure of the day is high above, as Bob Zoom saw a lucky clover on the branch of the apple tree. They decide to make a zip line to reach the lucky clover.

programme.title: Arthur: Prunella the Packrat
programme.desc: Prunella saves everything. Can Arthur help her break her packrat habits in time to put together the display for the school's Earth Day fair?

programme.title: Badanamu Cadets: The Snow Ecco Surprise
programme.desc: The Cadets are in the middle of a seal-saving operation when they are attacked by the Snow Ecco. Turns out, it is being controlled by none other than Esme. The Cadets must put their heads together to stop Esme and her evil plan.

programme.title: Badanamu Stories: Mimi's Color Secret
programme.desc: Bada wants to climb a tree, Abby wants to go to the pumpkin patch, and Mipi wants to pick grapes. However, they can't go out in the storm, so Mimi comes up with a plan.

programme.title: Blippi Wonders: Astronauts / Library / Diwali
programme.desc: Blippi flies into outer space with D.Bo where they meet Rihanna the rocket. Blippi floats in zero gravity, eats astronaut food, and even performs a space walk to fix Rihanna۪s navigation system! / Blippi, Tabbs, and Babble meet Catie Caterpillar and go on a wild library cart ride through the library and past various sections of subjects until they finally arrive at the enormous room full of books all about dinosaurs! / Blippi, Meekah, and Tabbs go to India in this super colorful episode where they meet Deep the diya and work together to help him light the traditional lanterns for Diwali all while dancing to a Bollywood beat.

programme.title: Everything's Rosie
programme.sub-title: How To Teach a Bear to Meet the Queen
programme.desc: BIG BEAR receives an invitation to have tea with the Queen!

programme.title: Pom Pom and Friends: Pom Pom Comes to His Senses / A Gift from Pom Pom / The Teddy Bears Problem
programme.desc: Pom Pom and May set out to pick watermelons, but the road gets foggy and they are unable to see anything. They end up using their five senses to get the watermelon so their friends can enjoy the delic

programme.title: Heroes of Goo Jit Zu: Gooing Under
programme.desc: Thrash is venturing into the ocean to find the source of those strange deep sea Goo signals. The ocean in this area seems to have a Goo-ish green glow that enters Thrash's body and activates his Deep Goo Sea Goo-volution. As he dives deeper, an entire undersea civilization appears in front of him! Temple-like buildings, cobblestone streets, and a magnificent statue of KING HYDRA!

programme.title: The Wiggles World: Little, Little, Little Lord Fauntleroy
programme.desc: What?s happening in The Wiggles World today? The Wiggles are joined by Little, Little, Little Lord Fauntleroy, who is here to play music. Anthony plays the director and fun ensues. ëThe Cartoon Wiggles? are here in an all-new animated music video, ëShirley Shawn The Unicorn?.

programme.title: The Adventures of Teddy Ruxpin: The Faded Fobs
programme.desc: Teddy and Grubby ask the Wooly What's-It for help in returning the Fobs' colours back.

programme.title: JillianTubeHD
programme.desc: Join YouTube star, JillianTubeHD, as she makes everything from delicious desserts to gold, glittery slime!

programme.title: Toys and Colors
programme.desc: Toys and Colors teaches kids life skills, letters, numbers, and more – all in a fun and family-friendly way!

programme.title: Kids Diana Show
programme.desc: Join Diana and Roma for a magical mermaid tale in a series of maritime adventures!

programme.title: Challenge Squad
programme.desc: Challenge Squad takes on the most epic challenges, featuring your favorite YouTube stars!

programme.title: KidCity
programme.desc: Play along with the KidCity family —Little Flash, Ava, DadCity, and MomCity— in all their kid-friendly games!

programme.title: Ryan's World Specials
programme.desc: Discover how fun learning can be with YouTube superstar, Ryan, and all of his Ryan's World friends!

programme.title: Ryan's World Specials
programme.desc: Discover how fun learning can be with YouTube superstar, Ryan, and all of his Ryan's World friends!

programme.title: LankyBox
programme.desc: LankyBox is Roblox superstars Justin and Adam, two best friends who love playing popular video games!

programme.title: Dick
programme.desc: The year is 1972 and like most high-school students, Betsy Jobs (Kirsten Dunst) and Arlene Lorenzo (Michelle Williams) just want to have a good time. But when, during a class field trip to the White House, they cluelessly wander into a behind-closed-doors, top-secret shredding session, it's time toboth wag the dog, and walk it. Seeking to uncover just how much the witless duo discovered, the Commander-In-Chief, appoints them "Official White House Dog Walkers," and it isn't long before the girls go from taking out Checkers, to taking out Tricky Dick, in this fun-raising comedy of historic distortions.

programme.title: A Rainy Day in New York
programme.desc: Woody Allen's romantic comedy A RAINY DAY IN NEW YORK tells the story of college sweethearts, Gatsby (Timothée Chalamet) and Ashleigh (Elle Fanning), whose plans for a romantic weekend together in New York City are dashed as quickly as the sunlight turns into showers. The two are soon parted, and each has a series of chance meetings and comical adventures while on their own.

programme.title: The Internship
programme.desc: Billy (Vince Vaughn) and Nick (Owen Wilson) are salesmen whose careers have been torpedoed by the digital world. Trying to prove they are not obsolete, they defy the odds by talking their way into a coveted internship at Google, along with a battalion of brilliant college students. But gaining entrance to this utopia is only half the battle. Now they must compete with a group of the nation's most elite, tech-savvy geniuses to prove that necessity really is the mother of re-invention.

programme.title: Dirty 30
programme.desc: Lifelong friends Kate (Mamrie Hart), Evie (Grace Helbig) and Charlie (Hannah Hart) are in a rut. On the eve of Kate's 30th birthday, she agrees to let Evie and Charlie throw her a party. But what's supposed to be a simple celebration becomes a wild who's who of past and present, and things quickly spiral out of control.

programme.title: Continuum
programme.desc: After the disappearance of a young scientist on a business trip, his son and wife struggle to cope, only to make a bizarre discovery years later - one that may bring him home.

programme.title: Me, Myself and Di
programme.desc: After winning the 'trip of a lifetime' to a caravan park in Rhyl, North Wales, unlucky in love Northerner, Janet Brown, is ready for a holiday romance. Unfortunately, following the advice of best friend Diana (Lucy Pinder) - that Janet should pretend to be the opposite of who she actually is in order to find love - doesn't quite lead to the happily ever after she was hoping for. A laugh-out-loud gritty rom-com with a huge ensemble cast including James Lance (Northern Soul, Bronson, Marie Antoinette, Bel Ami), Will Mellor (Two Pints of Lager and a Packet of Crisps, Line of Duty), Larry Lamb (EastEnders, The Hatton Garden Job), Marek Oravec (Captain America: The First Avenger), Wim Snape (The Full Monty, Coronation Street), and Katy Clayton (Casualty, Shameless).

programme.title: For the Love of Benji
programme.desc: Benji is on holiday with his family in Greece, but after getting separated at the airport, he finds himself on another exciting adventure, now on the run from international spies!

programme.title: Love N' Dancing
programme.desc: Jessica (Amy Smart) had given up on her dream of a life of the stage, until she meets ex-dance champion Jake (Tom Malloy), who becomes her teacher when the couple make an instant connection. Together, they decide to risk it all when they enter the World Swing Championship to reclaim Jake's former title.

programme.title: Relic Hunter
programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.title: Relic Hunter
programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.title: Relic Hunter
programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.title: Relic Hunter
programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.title: Relic Hunter
programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.title: Relic Hunter
programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.title: Relic Hunter
programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.title: Closed for Storm
programme.desc: Closed For Storm is a film detailing the incredible history of a massive, American theme park that was eventually left completely abandoned

programme.title: Change Of Heart
programme.desc: Diane McCarthy produces a TV show for her arrogant ex-boyfriend, Jared. Diane would love to quit to focus on her successful blog but she can't afford to.

programme.title: When Duty Calls
programme.desc: When newlyweds, Ellie and Martin, both volunteer at their local police department they find themselves tangled in a criminal case.

programme.title: Lake Effects
programme.desc: After the loss of their father, two estranged sisters reunite with their mother at their enchanting family lake house and find that the secret to overcoming tragedy and rebuilding hope lies in their ability to look deeper at themselves.

programme.title: The Thanksgiving House
programme.desc: When Boston lawyer Mary Ross inherits a house in Plymouth from her late aunt, she has no idea she may have inherited a historical treasure.

programme.title: Hope Ranch
programme.desc: A young girl has it all—a beautiful ranch, a horse named Faith, and the love of her family. But after the death of her military father, she and her mother are in danger of losing their family ranch too. With a little help from friends and their majestic white horse, they hatch a plan to raise enough money to save the ranch while learning to never lose hope, despite all odds.

programme.title: Heaven Is Waiting
programme.desc: It has been years since Ned Stevens, a charming self-made success, lost his wife Kate to cancer. Yet he still can't let go of her memory and move forward with his life.. But when Liz brings home a new boyfriend from college -- Ned finds that his comfortable world is turned upside down as Liz tries to divert his attention to Carol, an attractive single woman who lives in Ned's neighborhood.

programme.title: Love In Aruba
programme.desc: A lonely teacher (Amber) is hired by Connor, the single father of a struggling student. She is to tutor his daughter Macey (age 10) over a summer while they travel for his work. As Amber helps Macey, she sees glimpses of what's missing in the family's life. Their grand destinations are filled with rich items and potential rewarding business deals, but it's missing heart. Amber's influence fills the void and brings Macey and Connor together. With it, Amber starts to fall in love with Connor, but can he see her as anything beyond the hired help?

programme.title: When We Last Spoke
programme.desc: In 1967, two sisters are abandoned and raised by grandparents in the town of Fireside. Humor, heartbreak, and triumph are served with whipped cream and lots of local nuts in this heartwarming tale of family, friendship, and forgiveness.

programme.title: Something Big
programme.desc: A man kidnaps the wife of a cavalry commander in order to exchange her for a Gatling gun that's being sold by a gun runner.

programme.title: Seven Alone
programme.desc: A frontier family crosses the U.S. by wagon train, hoping for a better life in the Oregon Territory.

programme.title: A Minute to Pray, a Second to Die
programme.desc: A cowboy escapes from jail with the help of his girlfriend, and goes after the men he believes are responsible for his brother being shot down by lawmen.

programme.title: Couples Vacation
programme.desc: When Jack and Amanda head off on a glamping trip to "reignite their spark", their blissful romantic getaway is rudely hijacked and they are left in more trouble than before!

programme.title: Baking Up Love
programme.desc: CEO of the Morton Pumpkin Company decides to commemorate the anniversary of the cutest town ever founded with a bake-off. The town sweetheart is expected to win. When her niece is left to stay, winning seems out of reach.

programme.title: 4 Wedding Planners
programme.desc: When Lily goes home to Hawaii, she wants to help save her family's wedding planning business, even when her ex-boyfriend shows up as a new client.

programme.title: Where Angels Fear to Tread
programme.desc: A story of a rich Edwardian widow who marries a handsome Tuscan dentist but dies in childbirth. Her English family travel to Italy in order to bring the child back home to England, but are unprepared for what unfolds...

programme.title: Love at Sunset Terrace
programme.desc: Tired of her fast-paced life in the city, Sophie Carter travels to a small seaside town to disconnect and self-reflect, staying at an Airbnb run by a widowed father of a young girl. With a little nudging from the matchmaking daughter, Sophie and Michael unexpectedly start to fall in love and Sophie must decide between returning home or following her heart.

programme.title: Baby Obsession
programme.desc: Anna Gray is pregnant and ready to start a family with her loving husband Jon. But she has no idea that Rachel, the mother of a baby who died from SIDS when Anna babysat her years ago, has been waiting for this day, determined to take back what Anna 'took from me'.

programme.title: The Lancaster Bomber
programme.desc: THE LANCASTER BOMBER is a documentary about one of history's most iconic aircrafts - the Lancaster bomber - and its instrumental role in the defeat of Nazi Germany.

programme.title: A Lover Betrayed
programme.desc: Five years after her son was killed, Tess Ford is ready to live again. But a one-night romance with a handsome soldier throws her life back into chaos as the young man's attraction turns out to be a frightening obsession.

programme.title: Dying for a Baby
programme.desc: Amber and Kyle are ready to move on after a car accident two years ago. But their world turns upside down when Jessica, the other driver who lost her unborn baby in the accident, moves in next door and gets a job with Amber's doctor - all in a plan to seek a cold form of revenge.

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: Chuck Scott gets a job as chauffeur to tough guy Eddie Roman but Chuck's involvement with Eddie's fearful wife becomes a nightmare.

programme.title: The Cortege
programme.desc: Capi is the oldest gravedigger in the cemetery. Used to working amidst the suffering of others and the jokes of his colleagues, there is only one person capable of taking him out of his daily routine. Every month for the last couple of years he has waited for Marta to take flowers to the grave of her husband. She is his last hope.

programme.title: The Devil's Liquor
programme.desc: Old man Eladio is dying. Throughout the last decades, he has lived alone, working in his old liquor factory. Modernity threatens his spirits business, but he refuses to abandon it. A visit by his oldest grandson will be the ideal moment to save the factor

programme.title: The Duke Is Tops
programme.desc: A theatrical producer puts aside his own success to boost the career of a talented singer.

programme.title: The Earth Trembles
programme.desc: In rural Sicily, the fishermen live at the mercy of the greedy wholesalers. One family risks everything to buy their own boat and operate independently.

programme.title: Whip It
programme.desc: In Bodeen, Texas, an indie-rock loving misfit finds a way of dealing with her small-town misery after she discovers a roller derby league in nearby Austin.

programme.title: Playing for Keeps
programme.desc: George is a retired soccer pro whose glory days are behind him. Burnt out on his playboy lifestyle and bankrupted by a string of bad investments, he moves back to Virginia to reconnect with his estranged ex-wife and neglected son.

programme.title: Left Behind
programme.desc: A small group of survivors are left behind after millions of people suddenly vanish and the world is plunged into chaos and destruction.

programme.title: Mad Money
programme.desc: Deep inside the most secure bank in America, three desperate women from very different worlds cook up the most unlikely heist of the century: Smuggle out millions of dollars in worn-out currency headed for a Federal Reserve shredder every day.

programme.title: Exceptional Beings
programme.desc: Two supernatural beings question their divine status when they meet an ordinary woman with a disturbing essence: a human being who does not correspond to what their millennia of knowledge of humanity has taught them.

programme.title: Breaking Infinity
programme.desc: Breaking Infinity is a time-bending thriller about a research scientist named Liam, who has become unstuck in time. The only people Liam can count on for help are the doctor treating him, Emma, who's convinced he's suffering from delusions and his lab assistant Garret. As Liam's episodes become more intense, and his jumps through time more extreme, Liam travels from the distant past where he's guided by a mysterious Old Man, to the future where he witnesses the end of the world - an apocalypse he may have caused.

programme.title: Dark Star
programme.desc: John Carpenter's pulp science fiction classic - this brilliantly clever and funny parody of Stanley Kubrick's 2001: A Space Odyssey, follows a warped intergalactic mission to blow up unstable planets. Four bored astronauts fill in time between missions catching up on their tans with the help of a sun-lamp, playing with a suspiciously plastic-looking alien mascot they are taking back to Earth and conversing with their female version of Hal. Things start to go horribly wrong when the spaceship computer misfires and a 'smart bomb' thinks it is God.

programme.title: Jumper
programme.desc: The science fiction thriller leaps into a new realm with JUMPER, which begins the epic adventures of a man who discovers that he possesses the exhilarating ability to instantly teleport anywhere in the world he can imagine. From New York to Tokyo, from the ruins of Rome to the heart of the Saharan Desert, anywhere is possible for David Rice (HAYDEN CHRISTENSEN), until he begins to see that his freedom is not total, that he's not alone... but part of an ongoing, global war that threatens the very survival of his rare and extraordinary kind.

programme.title: Dominion: The Last Star Warrior
programme.desc: In five days the world changed. As a retired Intelligence agent turned UFO investigator races to discover the fate of the human race, an alien observer searchs for the human woman he loves.

programme.title: The Suspect
programme.desc: Beth is wrongly accused of murdering her husband. With the help of an insurance investigator and her stepdaughter together they find the real killer.

programme.title: The Great New Wonderful
programme.desc: The Great New Wonderful weaves five stories against the backdrop of an anxious and uncertain post-9-11 New York City.

programme.title: Smooch
programme.desc: A rakishly handsome "English Royal" comes to America for an arranged marriage, and ends up being mugged in San Francisco's Golden Gate Park and left with amnesia.

programme.title: Secret Summer
programme.desc: Rachel tries to save a small towns library from being turned into a resort and turns to Jake, a writer, for help.

programme.title: The Age of Innocence
programme.desc: Nominated for five Academy Awards® including a win for Best Costume Design, Martin Scorsese's 1993 adaptation of Edith Wharton's novel is set in the elegant milieu of the oldest and richest families in 1870s New York. Marriages are like treaties between nations, their purpose not to cement romance or produce children, but to provide for the orderly transmission of wealth between the generations.

programme.title: I Could Never Be Your Woman
programme.desc: Rosie, a smart, successful single mom refuses to accept that life has passed her by just because she's turned 40. Then talented young actor Adam walks into her life and straight into her heart. Finally, Rosie seems to have met the right, but much younger, man. But is this just one more time she'll have to say I could never be your woman? An upbeat and acerbic romantic comedy directed by Amy Heckerling, featuring stellar cast: Michelle Pfeiffer, Paul Rudd, Saoirse Ronan, Jon Lovitz, Stacey Dash, Fred Willard, Sarah Alexander, Tracey Ullman, Henry Winkler.

programme.title: Love & Where to Find It
programme.desc: Two local coffee shop business owners despise each other in real life, but fall in love while unknowingly sending each other messages via a dating app on their friends' behalf.

programme.title: A Friend of the Family
programme.desc: Allison was unsettled by David's creepy attentions but she was the only one to suspect him of being a monster.

programme.title: Grace Is Gone
programme.desc: After learning that his wife has been killed in Iraq, a man takes his two daughters on a roadtrip to Florida.

programme.title: Major Movie Star
programme.desc: Movie star Megan Valentine loses everything when her sleazy boyfriend embezzles all her wealth.

programme.title: LOL
programme.desc: Anne deals with life as a working mother and raising a teen who seems to be growing up faster than expected.

programme.title: Class Rank
programme.desc: From the director of Glee, presenting a coming-of-age drama, in the vein of Easy A and Legally Blonde. Starring Olivia Holt (Cloak & Dagger), Skyler Gisondon (Booksmart), Bruce Dern (The Senator). Two high school outsiders join forces to overtake the local school board. Guided by their families, they enter the perilous world of politics and learn a thing or two about love.

programme.title: Dragon Blade
programme.desc: Inspired by true historical events, this epic action thriller stars martial arts legend Jackie Chan, John Cusack and Adrian Brody. When corrupt Roman leader Tiberius arrives with a giant army to claim the Silk Road, Huo An (Chan), teams up his army with an mysterious elite Legion, led by General Lucius (Cusack), to protect his country. A tale of courage, friendship and honour.

programme.title: Valhalla: Legend of Thor
programme.desc: No man, woman or child may defy the gods. When Thor and Loki seek refuge in the home of mortals, the youngest son fails to heed a warning from the gods. As atonement for the family's sins, the gods take the two youngest children under their wing and embark on an epic adventure from Midgard to Valhalla that will see them stare down ruthless giants, barbaric gods and the dreaded wolf Fenrir.

programme.title: Here Awhile
programme.desc: Here Awhile is a heart-wrenching and thought-provoking family drama starring Anna Camp (Pitch Perfect), Steven Strait (The Expanse) and Joe Lo Truglio (Brooklyn Nine Nine, Superbad). Terminally ill Anna returns to Portland, Oregon after fifteen years to reconnect with her long estranged younger brother Michael. She reveals to him the difficult decision she has made.

programme.title: A Focus To Kill
programme.desc: A woman is hired by her ex-boyfriend to manage his fortune. After an affair, she is forced to confront the fact that he may not be the man he once was. Starring Presciliana Esparolini (2018)

programme.title: Deadly BandB
programme.desc: A woman opens her dream bed-and-breakfast in a recently restored home, but the arrival of a dangerous guest quickly disturbs the peace. Stars Angie Patterson Muto and Chad Michael Collins (2018)

programme.title: Killer Cove
programme.desc: A woman begins a relationship with the detective she's hired to deal with her stalker. Unbeknownst to her the detective is her deadly avenging angel. Starring Cathy Baron (2019)

programme.title: Shattered Memories
programme.desc: After waking up next to the body of her former lover, a woman must track down the real killer. Starring Elizabeth Bogush (2018)

programme.title: One Of A Kind Love
programme.desc: Kyra's dream of becoming a jeweller might come to fruition. Little does she know someone has manifested a life for her too. (2020)

programme.title: The Birthday Wish
programme.desc: Gwen is turning 30 and is expecting her boyfriend to propose. But when the proposal does not materialise, she makes a birthday wish to take a glimpse into her future. Is it what she envisaged? (2017)

programme.title: Our Take on Love
programme.desc: Designer Isabella and filmmaker Blake are both hired to work at the Godfrey Manor Gala. Will the romantic location and the love stories they uncover change their perception of love for the better?

programme.title: The Wedding Fix
programme.desc: Recently single Gwen helps to plan her best friend's wedding. But finalising the final details are complicated when she is teamed-up with laid back best man, Josh. Stars Andrea Brooks. (2021)

programme.title: Love's Sweet Recipe
programme.desc: Courtney is a talented chef who has taken over the running of the family restaurant. But is her renewed zest for life and her newfound passion for cooking linked to Jake returning home? (2021)

programme.title: 3 Generations
programme.desc: 3 GENERATIONS tells the stirring and touching story of three generations of a family living under one roof in New York as they must deal with the life-changing transformation by one that ultimately affects them all. Ray (Elle Fanning) is a teenager who knows he's a boy, even though he was assigned female at birth. Ray has already been living as a boy for years, but is now ready to start hormone replacement therapy. His single mother, Maggie (Naomi Watts), must track down Ray's biological father (Tate Donovan) to get his legal consent to allow Ray's transition.

programme.title: Hollywood Homicide
programme.desc: Harrison Ford and Josh Hartnett star as unconventional homicide detectives in this gritty action-comedy from Ron Shelton, writer and director of Bull Durham and White Men Can't Jump. Joe Gavilan (Ford) is the seasoned veteran charged with showing K.C. Calden (Hartnett) the ropes, while investigating the gangland-style murder of a rap group.

programme.title: Born to Fight
programme.desc: Daniel Magder features as Matthew, the nerdy new kid in town with a passion for boxing. The school bully, Hector, is the resident boxing champion, dominating all opponents who stand in his way. After witnessing a few run-ins between Matthew and Hector, former pro boxer, now school janitor Dan Barnes (Steve Austin) trains Matthew for the biggest challenge of his life. What follows is a Rocky-esque tale of a young boy who forces everyone to change their preconceived notions of who he is and what he's capable of.

programme.title: In Time
programme.desc: In a future where time is literally money and aging stops at 25, the only way to stay alive is to earn, steal, or inherit more time. Will Salas lives minute-to-minute, until a windfall of time gives him access to the world of the wealthy, where he teams up with a beautiful young heiress to destroy the corrupt system.

programme.title: Blue Thunder
programme.desc: A tough but straight-arrow cop battles a group of military and government elitists who have developed an extraordinary helicopter into the ultimate weapon.

programme.title: White Water Summer
programme.desc: A group of city boys go on a camping trip with a counselor whose enthusiasm borders on the psychotic.

programme.title: Runaway
programme.desc: A cop of the future, an evil genius and a murderous robotic force in a deadly chase of runaway terror.

programme.title: Berry Gordy's The Last Dragon
programme.desc: An enjoyable pastiche of martial arts, romance, music, and video, THE LAST DRAGON presents a likable young hero, Leroy (Taimak), who aspires to become a kung fu master. Trouble arises in the form of a huge man who calls himself "Sho' Nuff, who is determined to prove himself the kung fu master of the neighborhood.

programme.title: Enough
programme.desc: An abused wife on the run from her violent husband finally decides she's had enough.

programme.title: Sheena
programme.desc: Exotic Tanya Roberts stars as Sheena, a comic book legend that comes to life. As a child, she was lost in the African jungle and adopted by the Zambouli tribe. She rules over the untamed wilds of Africa, until outsiders challenge her domain in this fun-filled action-adventure.

programme.title: Chances Are
programme.desc: A reincarnated soul (Robert Downey, Jr.) falls in love with his widow (Cybill Shepherd) 25 years after his death.

programme.title: Saving Silverman
programme.desc: Two friends try anything to keep their buddy and bandmate from marrying the wrong woman.

programme.title: Joe Dirt
programme.desc: Jeers turn to cheers when a hard luck but plucky itinerant janitor becomes an unlikely hero.

programme.title: Year One
programme.desc: When a couple of lazy hunter-gatherers (Black and Cera) are banished from their primitive village, they set off on an epic journey through the ancient world.

programme.title: Where hands touch
programme.desc: In 1944, a 15-year-old girl, daughter of a white German mother and a black African father, meets a member of the Hitler Youth. They become bound by the realization of the horrors being committed around them.

programme.title: The Pursuit Of Happiness
programme.desc: An alienated social drop-out accidentally runs over a woman in a rain storm. Though he can prove it was an accident, he refuses to cooperate with "the establishment," and is sentenced to a year in prison. With only a week left to his sentence, he gets involved in a knifing and manages to escape. He looks up his old girlfriend and the two fly off to Canada.

programme.title: A Birder's Guide to Everything
programme.desc: Sideways meets stand by me in this endearing story of friendhip, family & a place in bird watching history books. On the eve of his widower father's second wedding, fifteen-year-old birding fanatic David Portnoy (Kodi Smit-McPhee) thinks that he's made the discovery of a lifetime, the extinct Labrador duck! Now he and the two other stalwart members of the local Young Birders Society, joined by their headstrong photographer classmate Ellen (Katie Chang), take off on an epic road trip in search of the rare bird and elusive answers to teenage questions large and small.

programme.title: A Perfect Day
programme.desc: An author discovers fame when his book skyrockets to the bestseller list. But the trappings of his success challenges his relationships to his wife and daughter and it takes a visit from a mysterious stranger telling him he has 40 days to live for him to get his moral bearings back.

programme.title: Five Nights in Maine
programme.desc: A man, reeling from the tragic loss of his wife, travels to rural Maine to seek answers from his estranged mother-in-law, who is herself confronting grief. With David Oyelowo and Dianne Wiest.

programme.title: Hours
programme.desc: Paul Walker plays Nolan Hayes, the father of a child born prematurely in New Orleans just before the onset of Hurricane Katrina. With his wife having died in childbirth, Nolan is plunged, alone, into a desperate fight to save his newborn baby's life as the city crumbles around him...

programme.title: Jumper
programme.desc: The science fiction thriller leaps into a new realm with JUMPER, which begins the epic adventures of a man who discovers that he possesses the exhilarating ability to instantly teleport anywhere in the world he can imagine. From New York to Tokyo, from the ruins of Rome to the heart of the Saharan Desert, anywhere is possible for David Rice (HAYDEN CHRISTENSEN), until he begins to see that his freedom is not total, that he's not alone... but part of an ongoing, global war that threatens the very survival of his rare and extraordinary kind.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: In this live action movie-length version of the famous four, The Evil Shredder has returned to cause more mayhem and kidnaps the rat Ninja Master. But the Turtles have been armed with Professor Perry's Anti Mutant antidote and, with the help of a journalist, embark on an adventure to save the Ninja Master.

programme.title: Mortdecai
programme.desc: Juggling some angry Russians, the British Mi5, his impossibly leggy wife and an international terrorist, debonair art dealer and part time rogue Charlie Mortdecai (Johnny Depp) must traverse the globe armed only with his good looks and special charm in a race to recover a stolen painting rumored to contain the code to a lost bank account filled with Nazi gold.

programme.title: Lost in the Pacific
programme.desc: A luxury airline is making its maiden flight, with a group of VIP passengers on board, when disaster strikes. A mechanical failure forces the plane to crash land and it ends up on a remote Pacific island where passengers and crew must wait to be rescued. But soon they learn that the island has a dark, deadly secret and there are creatures that do not want them to leave. Stranded in the middle of nowhere, what began as a day of luxury soon turns into a fight for survival.

programme.desc: Snow Leopard is the one of the most elusive big cats in the world. This episode details how the wildlife guards and the wildlife department has set up conservation and scientific plans to protect and indeed to enumerate and increase it's population

programme.title: Heroes Of The Wild Frontiers
programme.desc: Rhino horn is very expensive in the illegal market and the poachers know it. Kaziranga has the only concentrated population of the one horned Rhino in the world. And poachers are attracted to Kaziranga like ants are to sugar.

programme.title: Ocean's Africa
programme.desc: In 'Dinosaurs Of The Deep' we accompany a team of WildOceans' scientists uncovering the mysteries behind the deep oceans. With only 32 individuals known to exist off the coast of South Africa, central to the storytelling will be the quest to discover the 33rd coelacanth.

programme.title: Marine Mammals
programme.desc: From giant sperm whales to dramatic humpbacks and playful dolphins, we can't resist the endless charms of marine mammals.

programme.title: Planet California: Rivers of Gold
programme.desc: It is a land of extremes - tallest, deepest, highest, hottest - and home to the richest concentration of biodiversity in the Americas. California sea lions pursue king salmon down the California Current and into their freshwater spawning grounds. Mountain lions stalk majestic bighorn sheep into the forbidding reaches of the Sierra Nevada and its vital snow-packs, and giant redwoods harvest precious water right out of the air. In a rapidly changing - and thirsty - world, drought, dams and fire pose dire threats to a vibrant ecosystem connected by rivers on land, in the sky and in the sea.

programme.title: Monkey Mayhem
programme.desc: Monkeys: loveable, aggressive, diverse and full of mischief. Our distant cousins have much in common with us. They're intelligent, cooperative and have complex relationships. They're some of the most evolutionary successful species on the planet, successful across the globe from Japanese snow monkeys to African baboons. Swinging through our family tree quickly reveals the diversity of our monkey relatives. They come in all shapes and sizes, and are certainly not as different from us as we might think.

programme.title: Wildlife Nannies: Wildlife Nannies: Baboon Mother
programme.desc: Baboon Mother: In South Africa, 76-yr. old Rita Miljo is raising the tiny baboon baby Rosie as if it were her own. As Rosie grows bigger and stronger, Rita takes her to a “baboon kindergarten”, where she is to form a new troop with others. We also witness Rita and her team releasing a troop of grown baboons into the wild. Wombat Baby Mater: Shaun Douglas of “Something Wild Wildlife Sanctuary” in Tasmania has become a surrogate “mom” to the tiny wombat Mater. As little wombats cling to their mothers for many months in their early lives, Shaun takes Mater with him wherever he goes – even to the shower and to bed!

programme.title: 15th Meridian East
programme.sub-title: Similarity in Difference: From Generation to Generation
programme.desc: The journey leads from the Norwegian Vesterålen to Chad, the Aeolian Islands and the Polish Giant Mountains. As different as the landscapes and cultures may be, all people are united in their love for their children and their desire to give something to tomorrow's generation.

programme.title: Magical Moors
programme.desc: Wide open heaths, windswept and barren in winter, are transformed into wonderful carpets of white, fluffy cotton grass in summer. Large bears and wolves roam alongside delicately fluttering butterflies, the bubbling calls of black grouse and the enchanting trills of the great snipe. Moors, bogs and wetlands can be found all over in Europe. Everyone has at least heard about this habitat but most know little about it. It is an ancient yet largely unknown set of landscapes that is full of enchanting surprises. On a warm spring day, poisonous adders emerge from hiding to perform their impressive mating dance. As dusk falls, snipe gather on traditional leks, leaping and singing to impress the opposite sex. And deep down in the boggy marshes, glittering emeralds of sticky dew lure insects into the deadly arms of meat-eating plants. Magical Moors captures the quiet beauty of a spectacular landscape, and its often elusive wildlife, in stunning detail.

programme.title: 15th Meridian East
programme.sub-title: Similarity in Difference: Sow, Harvest, Eat – Our Conservatory
programme.desc: This episode focuses on people from five countries who share a common passion: The production of their own food and food. What culinary treasures are hidden in the different regions, from Spitsbergen to Sweden, Austria, Poland and Chad?

programme.title: The Green Heart of Croatia
programme.sub-title: At the Banks of River Sava
programme.desc: Every year, in the middle of Croatia, it's the same story: after the annual snowmelt, a huge flood wave spills out of the Alps toward Zagreb and Belgrade. This leads to an increase in the River Sava's water levels of some ten metres. The contents of more than ten billion bathtubs floods an area the size of Lake Constance, often for months on end, yet still the Croatian and Serbian capital is spared a flood disaster. One of the reasons for this is the fact that the Sava is able to flow unhindered. The annual floods not only create a natural retention reservoir for flood control: alongside the Sava lies a natural paradise, unique in Central Europe. In the species-rich, alluvial flood forests of the last major meadow landscapes of the continent, enormous predatory fish like the catfish lie in wait for prey. The fertile floodplains of the Sava are an important resting place for more than 240 bird species, including Hoopoe, great crested Grebe, little Egret, common snipe and pied Avocet. Old, domestic livestock breeds like the Turopolje pig and Posavina horse spend almost the entire year in the floodplains. They appreciate the alluvial meadows, keep puddles and mudholes open whilst wallowing and, as living lawnmowers, they ensure that the moist meadows aren't transformed into dense oak forests. Thanks to this traditional pasture farming, more than 700 pairs of white stork alone breed in the Lonjsko Polje National Park. The Sava Floodplains allow us to glance into the past of our continent and at the same time, illustrate just how flood protection for major towns can be perfected.

programme.title: 15th Meridian East
programme.sub-title: Similarity in Difference: The Raw Wilderness
programme.desc: Almost 11000 kilometres lie between the northernmost and southernmost point of the 15th meridian east. Here you will find extreme landscapes such as the shimmering heat of Africa or the eternal cold of northern Scandinavia. Five people from Spitsbergen, Namibia, Slovenia, Germany and Poland dedicate their lives to environmental protection.

programme.title: Dreams of the Settlers
programme.sub-title: An American Journey: Through Utah's Canyons to Salt Lake City
programme.desc: It's a dream route leading from the casino metropolis of Las Vegas, to Salt Lake City, the Mormon capital. It is a journey that follows the footsteps of the first settlers: the Mormons. They came to this desert belt of the United States during the second half of the 19th century to escape persecution and in search of the promised land. Some of them founded Las Vegas. Others moved through the canyons and over the mountains of the colossal Colorado Plateau, where they found water and pasture, to establish many small settlements. The landscapes through which they trekked, had and still have, a breathtaking and bizarre majestic beauty. Bryce Canyon, the hogbacks and the Escalante Staircase plateau are dramatic scenes of wonder formed from rock. The Pajute Indians once described Bryce Canyon as: “red rocks standing like men in a basin”.
